signals.headline: ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Highest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Highest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]  
Ethereum ETFs saw over $275 million in weekly inflows—the strongest since January—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to nearly $2,400 as of April 22.[1][2]
